Added_Other.name: DFIntRbxTelemetryBaseRetryRandomOffsetRangeMs_IXP

Added_Other.name: DFIntRbxTelemetryBaseRetryTimeMs_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a retry time for telemetry data transmission in milliseconds.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures more reliable data collection for monitoring game performance.

Added_Other.name: DFIntRbxTelemetryMaxBackoffTimeMs_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on how long the system waits before retrying failed requests.
Added_Other.purpose: Optimizes data sending, ensuring smoother gameplay and faster responses.

Added_Other.name: DFIntRbxTelemetryMaxConcurrentRetriedRequests_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Limits the number of retry attempts for telemetry requests to a maximum number.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves the reliability of data collection by ensuring that too many retries don't overload the system.

Added_Other.name: DFIntRbxTelemetryMaxElapsedTimeMs_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a maximum time limit for telemetry data collection.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves performance by ensuring data is collected efficiently.

Added_Other.name: DFIntRbxTelemetryMaxRetryAttempts_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on how many times the system will try to send data if it fails.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves the reliability of data tracking for better game performance.

Added_Other.name: FFlagRbxTelemetryEnableHttpRetries3_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Allows the system to retry HTTP requests if they fail.
Added_Other.purpose: Increases the reliability of data collection, helping developers understand player behavior better.

Added_Other.name: FFlagTelemetryRetryOnConnectFail_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Retries telemetry data sending if the initial connection fails.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures that important gameplay data is captured even if there are temporary connection issues.

Added_Other.name: FFlagTelemetryRetryOnDnsResolve_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Allows the system to retry DNS resolution for telemetry data.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances reliability in data collection, ensuring better performance insights.
